response.overview: The 10th Bang Your Head!!! Festival, held in Balingen, Germany in June 2005. The event sold out at 20,000 fans before the gates even opened, with organizers reuniting some of the heaviest names in metal to mark the occasion: Motörhead, Dio, Twisted Sister, Saxon, Doro, U.D.O., Candlemass, Amon Amarth, Destruction, Sebastian Bach, Hanoi Rocks, Krokus, Axel Rudi Pell, and more.  This double-DVD set captures the whole thing across 39 live performances, from day one's uninterrupted onslaught to a second day that nearly didn't happen. Bonus material includes backstage footage, a Nasty Savage warm-up set from the night before, and a 20-page photo booklet. A real document of one of the genre's most memorable festivals - for better and worse.
response.tagline: Bang Your Head 2005 - Live Fri June 24, 2005 - Sat June 25, 2005 in Messegelände, Balingen, Germany
response.title: Bang Your Head!!! Festival 2005
